label: Make an API call
description: Perform an arbitrary authorized API call to the OKRunit API. This is useful for endpoints not covered by other modules.

expect.name: url
expect.label: URL
expect.help: A path relative to the base URL, e.g. /api/v1/approvals. You can also enter a full URL.

expect.name: method
expect.label: Method
expect.help: The HTTP method of the request.

expect.name: headers
expect.label: Headers
expect.help: Additional request headers. Authorization is added automatically.

expect.name: qs
expect.label: Query string
expect.help: Query string parameters to append to the URL.

expect.name: body
expect.label: Body
expect.help: The request body as a JSON string. Only used for POST, PUT, and PATCH requests.
